authors: Abu Jafar Saifullah, Tasmia Zerin, Zerina Begum, Kazi Sakib
title: NavA11y: A Dynamic Analysis Approach for WCAG 2.4 Focus-Behavior Evaluation
venue: In Proceedings of the International Conference on Evaluation of Novel Approaches to Software Engineering (ENASE 2026)
keyResults: 100% precision and recall on a 22-page controlled dataset (32 SC-level assertions)
90% precision confirmed via independent manual validation (PABAK = 0.80)
First tool to cover all five WCAG 2.4 focus-behavior success criteria
